requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire-Safety and Site Approval Package
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全和场址批准资料包
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全和場址批准資料包

summary.en: Public sources reviewed do not confirm a single Egypt-wide BESS fire-test certification equivalent to a whole-unit product approval. Fire safety should therefore be handled as a site and project package: local civil-defense / fire-authority review where required, building and electrical safety review, emergency response plans, ventilation or gas detection where relevant, thermal-runaway mitigation, and customer / insurer evidence such as IEC 62933 safety documentation or UL 9540A where specified.
summary.zh: 已查阅公开来源未确认埃及存在等同整机产品批准的全国统一BESS火灾测试认证。因此，消防安全应按场址和项目资料包处理：适用时接受当地民防/消防主管机关审查、建筑和电气安全审查、应急响应计划、适用时通风或气体探测、热失控缓解，以及客户/保险方指定的IEC 62933安全文件或UL 9540A等证据。
summary.zht: 已查閱公開來源未確認埃及存在等同整機產品批准的全國統一BESS火災測試認證。因此，消防安全應按場址和項目資料包處理：適用時接受當地民防／消防主管機關審查、建築和電氣安全審查、應急響應計劃、適用時通風或氣體探測、熱失控緩解，以及客戶／保險方指定的IEC 62933安全文件或UL 9540A等證據。

standards_or_laws: Egypt local civil-defense / fire-authority site review where applicable
Project, insurer, utility, and owner fire-safety specifications

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558, and project fire-review materials for stationary energy storage. These can support Egypt fire due diligence but do not replace Egyptian site approval or project-specific fire-safety evidence.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及项目消防审查资料管理固定式储能安全。这些可支持埃及消防尽调，但不能替代埃及场址批准或项目特定消防安全证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及項目消防審查資料管理固定式儲能安全。這些可支持埃及消防盡調，但不能替代埃及場址批准或項目特定消防安全證據。

gap.en: Provide layout drawings, separation distances, fire detection and suppression concept, emergency shutdown logic, ventilation and gas analysis where relevant, thermal-runaway propagation evidence, SDS, firefighter response information, commissioning checks, and Arabic or English emergency procedures requested by the reviewer.
gap.zh: 应提供布置图、间距、火灾探测和灭火方案、紧急停机逻辑、适用时通风和气体分析、热失控蔓延证据、SDS、消防救援信息、调试检查，以及审查方要求的阿拉伯语或英语应急程序。
gap.zht: 應提供布置圖、間距、火災探測和滅火方案、緊急停機邏輯、適用時通風和氣體分析、熱失控蔓延證據、SDS、消防救援資訊、調試檢查，以及審查方要求的阿拉伯語或英語應急程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where local fire, building, utility, insurer, or project approval applies; no cited blanket Egypt whole-unit BESS fire certification confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, local fire review, and applicable GB requirements

source.publisher: Egyptian Electric Utility and Consumer Protection Regulatory Agency (EgyptERA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a battery certificate alone for an Egypt BESS project. Build a site-specific fire-safety package and confirm whether civil-defense, building, utility, insurer, or project-owner review is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及BESS项目不能仅依赖电池证书。应建立场址特定消防安全资料包，并确认是否需要民防、建筑、公用事业单位、保险方或项目业主审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及BESS項目不能僅依賴電池證書。應建立場址特定消防安全資料包，並確認是否需要民防、建築、公用事業單位、保險方或項目業主審查。
